name: Polygiene AB (publ.)
summary: Polygiene AB (publ.) develops, manufactures, and sells odor control solutions for clothes, sports equipment, textiles, and other materials in the Middle East, Africa, the Asia Pacific, the Americas, Europe, and internationally. The company serves partners in the sports and outdoor, lifestyle, home design, footwear, and workwear segments. It offers its products under the Polygiene brand. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
